title: The Unchastened Woman
writer: Louis K. Anspacher, Douglas Z. Doty
actors: Theda Bara, Wyndham Standing, Dale Fuller
plot: When Caroline Knollys goes to tell her husband Husband they they are expecting, she finds him in the arms of another woman. She leaves him, not telling him of her pregnancy, and runs off to Europe where she has the baby and become...
